Discovery Defendants San Francisco Giants Enterprises Llc And China Basin Ballpark Company Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance Of Plaintiff At Deposition And Production Of Documents; Request For Monetary Sanction (C.C.P. 2025.450, 2023.010 Et Seq)
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Thomas Douvan of the law offices of Frasetto Law (510-817-0468) appears as counsel for defendants/moving parties

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

Defendants San Francisco Giants Enterprises Llc And China Basin Ballpark Company Llc's Motion To Compel Attendance Of Plaintiff At Deposition And Production Of Documents; Request For Monetary Sanction (C.C.P. 2025.450, 2023.010 Et Seq) is GRANTED. The motion is unopposed. Plaintiff shall appear for her deposition within two weeks of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $600 are awarded against plaintiff and her counsel in favor of moving party. Sanctions are due within two weeks of notice of entry of this order. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Judy Ranzers Response To Demand For Production Set One Request For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Thomas Douvan of the law offices of Frasetto Law (510-817-0468) appears as counsel for defendants/moving parties

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANTS SAN FRANCISCO GIANTS ENTERPRISES LLC and CHINA BASIN BALLPARK CO.LLC's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Judy Ranzers Response To Demand For Production Set One Request For Monetary Sanction is GRANTED. The motion is unopposed. Plaintiff shall provide verified responses to RFPs within two weeks of notice of entry of this order.
